name: Applesauce Nut Bread (Makes 1 Large Loaf)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, thoroughly combine sugar, applesauce, oil, eggs, and milk.
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, and nutmeg.
3. Add the sifted dry ingredients to the applesauce mixture and beat until well combined.
4. Stir in the chopped pecans.
5. Pour the batter into a well-greased loaf baking pan.
6. For topping, mix together 1/4 cup brown sugar, 1/4 tsp ground cinnamon, and 1/4 cup chopped pecans.
7. Sprinkle the topping evenly over the batter.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour. Loaf should be loosely covered with foil after the first 30 minutes of baking to prevent excessive browning.
9. Remove from the pan and allow it to cool on a rack before slicing.
